creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The laptop is Lenovo 320.

The Radeon driver is configured with:

Section "Device"
        Identifier "Card0"
        Driver "scfb"
        BusID "pci0:0:1:0"
EndSection

This is the only text that the xorg configuration has.

Backlight feature is certainly supported by the hardware, because there are corresponding Fn-Fxx keys that work in Windows.
